title: Education experts slam leaked Alberta curriculum proposals
author: Janet French
notes: EARLIER THAN EVT-055 (March 2021 official draft). This Oct 2020 article covers LEAKED ADVISER DOCUMENTS recommending: removal of all residential school references, memorization of facts for young children, Bible verses in Grade 1. Expert: 'would be a laughingstock.' Adviser Chris Champion called First Nations curriculum inclusion a 'fad.' Context/precursor to EVT-055. Could anchor a separate EVT for the 2020 leak controversy.
